overview: AnuBose Institute of Technology for Women is a women's engineering college at New Paloncha in Bhadradri Kothagudem district. The official website describes ABIT as a UGC autonomous institution, approved by AICTE and affiliated to JNTUH, with engineering, diploma, and MBA offerings.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous Institution; AICTE approved; affiliated to JNTUH.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech - Civil, CSE, CSE (AI and ML), CSE (Data Science), ECE, EEE, Mechanical, Mining

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Fee not clearly published on current public admissions pages
Fee not clearly published on current public admissions pages

admissions.admissionProcess: The official admissions page states that B.Tech admissions are based on EAMCET merit after eligibility in 10+2 with Physics and Mathematics. The site also lists MBA and diploma intake and provides a separate admissions office contact for guidance.
admissions.importantDates: TG EAPCET, TG ECET, and TG ICET schedules are notified by Telangana authorities each cycle; the institute also maintains its own admissions enquiry page for updates.

campus.specialNote: ABIT is positioned and branded on its official pages as a women's engineering institution.

contact.address: K.S.P. Road, New Paloncha - 507115, Bhadradri Kothagudem District, Telangana, India
